full_text: In his National Day address,  @ChingteLai  reaffirmed defense commitments, not only in increased investments, but in tech, industry, resilience, & a T-Dome vision of  layered defenses.
This is remarkable progress.  Congratulations to President Trump and all parties involved.  May sustainable peace prevail, in all parts of the world.   🙏

Concern and sympathies for those affected by the earthquake in the Philippines.   Our search and rescue teams stand ready to deploy if additional help is needed.  🙏❤️
https://t.co/UNvsoqhxzK

The Taiwan Railway Co shared these photos of volunteers swarming off the train, carrying tools on their way to help clean homes devastated by floods and mudslides in Hualien.   SO touched & ❤️ this Taiwanese spirit of doing good and helping each other. https://t.co/3PNMh9EgFb
台湾が最も必要としているときに、常に友情と温かさを示してくださる日本政府と国民に感謝します。🙏❤️

I spent the day in Kuangfu, Hualien, where the overflow of a quake barrier lake flooded the town, causing widespread damage and loss of lives.  I thank all the rescue teams and volunteers who have helped evacuees, and pray that the missing can be founded.  🙏

Our ag trade moving! Wheat futures rebounded from a slump the prior session, following the signing of a letter of intent in which a Taiwan group pledged to buy 3.6 million tons of the grain from the US over the next three years.  

https://t.co/C3D3yuVJ3u

A big thank-you to @SenTedCruz for leading joint efforts with @SenatorWicker & @SenJeffMerkley to support Taiwan’s membership in ICAO.  China’s bullying and unreasonable exclusion of Taiwan compromises civil aviation safety for all.  https://t.co/YyXOAqfuNG

Taiwan consumers have long enjoyed US agricultural products, including soy, corn, wheat & beef, among others.  Another delegation will be in the US to BUY MORE, contributing to the robust trade partnership that benefits both.  

https://t.co/o0kNJ8TWnH

A big thanks to the Japanese consumers who have been buying Taiwan pineapples, especially since 2021 when farmers started to face sanctions and economic coercion from China.  Yes, we like to call them Freedom Pineapples.  🍍 🍍🍍

Shocked to see the news of Charlie Kirk’s assassination.  Like Americans, we also see university campuses as safe places for learning,  free speech, & debate.   Different views can be argued, but violence must not be tolerated, on campus or anywhere.
Glad to reconnect in a virtual call with Senator @SenatorHagerty  I’ve always appreciated his support for the Taiwan-US partnership. https://t.co/dcs5HRopOx
RT @ChingteLai: On #Taiwan's #ArmedForcesDay, we look back on 80 years after the end of WWII, reminded again that aggression fails & unity…

I hosted a luncheon in honor of  Chairman @SenatorWicker and @SenatorFischer of US Senate Armed Services Committee.  They reaffirmed the US  support for our defense & trade partnership & I highlighted our commitment to upholding peace through strength. https://t.co/hmxELPCYYM

We thank the UK and Japan for reaffirming the importance of peace and stability in the Taiwan Strait, and stressing opposition to unilateral attempts to change the status quo by force or coercion.  Peace is the only option.   https://t.co/6f9OGgGznm
RT @ChingteLai: My warmest congratulations to Tung-Yuan Little League, our @LittleLeague World Series champions! Representing the Asia-Paci…
RT @ChingteLai: Visiting our Navy's 168th fleet today, I announced that in addition to defense spending reaching 3.32% of GDP in 2026, we a…
The defense budget proposed for next year, at a record high and 3.32% of GDP,  is a demonstration of our commitment to building defensive strength, ensuring peace, and protecting Taiwan’s freedom.
RT @ChingteLai: History tells us that those who unite to defend freedom against military aggression emerge victorious. Today, as we mark th…

Many thanks again for this message of concern, as southern Taiwan rebuilds following rain, floods, and mudslides.  Helping and assisting each other through difficult times is the spirit that brings our people closer together.
RT @ChingteLai: Just visited our emergency operations center to inspect disaster response efforts for torrential rain in southern Taiwan -…

Deepest condolences to the family, friends,  & colleagues of Dr. Ed Fuelner.  He was a great friend of Taiwan.  I will miss his annual meetings to deliver the Economic Freedom  Index & discussions on the state of the world.  May he rest in peace.  🙏

So proud of our soldiers, who have been through strenuous training and test after test, in demonstrating our preparedness in layered defenses through the #HanKuang41 exercise.  All to protect our country, and our freedom.  🇹🇼💪

https://t.co/G1hVHESzQ7

Thank you Pope Leo XIV for your prayers and best wishes to those who continue to be affected by Typhoon Danas.  We are also praying for the power repair and engineer teams who remain hard at work to rebuild.  https://t.co/NJBNp3x8dl

Thank you @shigeruishiba  Parts of Taiwan remain severely impacted by Typhoon Danas, and as we work toward recovery, it is always comforting to know that the Japanese people are supporting us with deep compassion.

Sincere condolences to those who have lost loved ones in these horrifying Texas floods, and hoping for more rescues.  Taiwan is also bracing for a typhoon, and in facing extreme weather, we pray for the safety and well-being of all.

Congratulations  🎆 🎉 to the American people on your 249th Independence Day! I was glad to join AIT’s Director Greene in a baseball theme, stepping up to deal with fastballs and curveballs together, in the spirit of a 🇹🇼 🇺🇸 Taiwan-USA champion team. https://t.co/rFezgwYYpQ
Thankful to global parliamentarians who have expressed solidarity against violence and coercion.   Taiwan will not be isolated by intimidation.

I welcomed  @ShawnRyan762 and his team who came to understand firsthand Taiwanese perspectives on our geopolitical challenges.  No country is too small to deserve freedom, and thanks for standing with Taiwan.
RT @ChingteLai: Authoritarian regimes erase history; democracies have a duty to preserve it. Today, we remember those who marched for freed…

I welcomed bipartisan, bicameral members of Congress this week, loved the duck souvenirs from @SenDuckworth & enjoyed talks with members of the House Committee on Natural Resources.   Energy, supply chains, security & trade remain our focus. https://t.co/0TCOaAbAqK

Deepest condolences.  Congressman Connolly co-chaired the Congressional Taiwan Caucus and was a tireless advocate for strong ties with Taiwan, supporting human rights, democracy, and friendship.  May he rest in peace.

One year anniversary into this job, proud to be a member of #TeamTaiwan.  Tough environment with challenges inside and out, but we are determined to make Taiwan strong, and keep our people safe and prosperous.  💪 🙏 https://t.co/N8YWpPMbmC
RT @ChingteLai: In my interview with @nikkei (@NikkeiAsia), I spoke on Taiwan’s efforts to enhance defense & build global non-red supply ch…
RT @ChingteLai: On behalf of Taiwan's government & people, I sincerely congratulate Pope Leo XIV and wish His Holiness wisdom and grace in…
Thanks to the US House of Representatives for once again demonstrating bipartisan assurance and solidarity by passing HR1512 & HR2416 bills today.

Honored to join this year’s #HillAndValley forum. thanks @jacobhelberg for bringing tech and policy together. 🇹🇼 is proud to partner with 🇺🇸 to uphold freedom, lead in AI, and drive a new era of industrial strength.

#TaiwanDelivers #FreeWorldAI #USTaiwanPartnership https://t.co/ZUh4PDoNLD
RT @ChingteLai: Commemorating the victims of the Holocaust today, we are reminded of the threats that hatred, prejudice, and extremism pose…
Sincere condolences from the people and government of Taiwan 🙏

Glad to have a productive dinner discussion with visiting friends @SenatorRicketts, @ChrisCoonsforDE & @SenTedBuddNC on how Taiwan & US can both benefit from a strong partnership in trade, tech, industry and security. https://t.co/NNSmLp7sts
So sorry to hear this.  Amb Armitage will be respectfully and fondly remembered for his wisdom, diplomacy, statesmanship, & also for his personal warmth and friendship.
RT @ChingteLai: My @business op-ed outlines a roadmap to deepen #Taiwan-#US trade ties, through expanded procurements & more. As new challe…
RT @G7: Read the full statement: https://t.co/oWH6v9nhAX
Praying for those in Thailand and SE Asia affected by the Myanmar earthquake.  Taiwan’s experienced search & rescue teams stand ready to help where needed.  🙏 ❤️
RT @ChingteLai: 東日本大震災から14年が経ちました。この14年間、台湾と日本は災害救助、感染症対策など幾多の困難を支え合い、交流を深めてきました。この強い絆に基づき、今後もパートナーシップを深め、地域の安全、経済・貿易、社会の強靭性などの分野で連携を強め、善良な…

The expansion of TSMC’s global presence with this additional $100 billion US investment announcement will further solidify Taiwan-US tech cooperation as force multipliers for AI and other emerging tech.
Thank you, Chairman Risch, for once again calling China out on their malign tactics in the international system, and for reiterating your support for Taiwan.

President Lai reiterates the government’s commitment to national security and defense, proposing a special budget to support defense spending needs.  

https://t.co/Z7XlaEzSmX
Sincere condolences to the people of Guatemala, especially the families of the victims in this tragic accident.  We are with you.  🙏 🇬🇹

True greatness must be achieved in a peaceful world.  We welcome their emphasis on peace and stability across the Taiwan Strait, and opposition to any attempts to unilaterally change the status quo by force or coercion. 
https://t.co/AoQav0Zw90
RT @ChingteLai: Sincere thanks to President @BArevalodeLeon & @SecRubio for expressing firm support for the relationship shared by #Taiwan,…
It pains me to see the images of the flight collision above the familiar Potomac River & DCA.   Prayers to all those affected 🙏
As we welcome the lunar new year of the snake, may happiness be as long and plentiful, & wishing everyone a peaceful and prosperous new year. https://t.co/im4E3o5Rul

Sincere congratulations to @marcorubio for being confirmed as the next US Secretary of State.  Looking forward to a strong partnership toward our shared interests in peace, prosperity, and defending freedom in the IndoPacific.  

 https://t.co/cUvkDlVioB
So glad to see bipartisan members of the House in action again on this matter that is so important for two-way investment between Taiwan & the US.
It’s painful to see one tragedy after another around the word, with the LA fires being the latest disaster.   Praying for the safety and wellness of all those affected.  🙏

Sadness and sincere condolences to the loved ones of the victims in the car attack in New Orleans, the plane incidents in South Korea and Azerbaijan, and ongoing conflicts.  It is a chaotic world, where we must do more to uphold peace.  🙏
RT @MOFA_Taiwan: Our deepest condolences to those affected by the Jeju Air plane crash, as well as their families & friends. #Taiwan🇹🇼 grie…
A big historic day for Taiwan, marking the first gold medal championship for #TeamTaiwan in the WSBC #Premier12 professional baseball.   What a great team!   Thank you!  ⚾️ 🥇🏆 https://t.co/h6gP11xNjk

The criminalization of democracy in Hong Kong recalls the dark days of Taiwan’s Martial Law era.  It is also a reminder that we cannot take freedom for granted.  Defending our democracy and our freedom to think, to speak, to vote, & to live, is a duty.
RT @MOFA_Taiwan: Democracy is not a crime! We condemn #China's blatant abuse of the law to deprive HKers of their freedom & sentence 45 of…
Best wishes to President @SantiPenap for a speedy and healthy recovery! 🫶❤️
RT @ChingteLai: Nuestros pensamientos están con el presidente @SantiPenap tras conocer sobre su reciente hospitalización. Le deseamos una r…
Congratulations to PM @shigeruishiba on his continuing leadership of Japan, Taiwan’s close neighbor with deep ties.  Look forward to working on a strong and constructive partnership.
Palau is a beautiful country with beautiful people.  Congratulations to @Surangeljr & VP-elect Oilouch on the election!

I join President Lai in offering my congratulations to President Trump, VP-elect Vance, and the American people.  Looking forward building a strong Taiwan-US partnership, for freedom, peace, and economic prosperity.

I welcomed Idaho Gov Brad Little’s delegation with a surprise gift from YunTech 雲科大 students: Potato tarts made with 3D printing tech, a creative gesture symbolic of our robust trade in technology & agriculture. https://t.co/jWK1PaSEj7

“Taiwan has experienced similar tragedies and understands the profound sense of loss that follows typhoons and earthquakes. It is this shared experience that motivates us to stand in solidarity with the people of NC during this difficult time.” https://t.co/QvlBhyREOA

Proud of you, proud of Taiwan 🌈

Glad to take part in Asia’s largest Pride parade today, in celebration of diversity and equality in Taiwan.   We’ve come a long way, and we cherish the freedom to be ourselves.  

https://t.co/nwIt9HXbeA
My heart goes to those suffering from the damage of the typhoon.  We offer support to our Filipino neighbors, as we also pursue regular efforts in building greater HADR resilience.    🙏
RT @GLandsbergis: China's interests are aligned with Russia's, not ours. China has no reason to help us secure peace for Ukraine and we hav…
RT @TaiwanPresSPOX: ▶️ In response to China's exercises today, the Presidential Office stated that China should cease its military provocat…

RT @mna_roc: F-16狙擊手莢艙監控共機

#空軍 #F16 #守護家園 #中華民國 #臺灣 #ROCArmedForce #ProtectOurCountry #ROC #Taiwan🇹🇼 https://t.co/9j28LI6ElB
RT @Focus_Taiwan: Responding to China’s military drills, the Presidential Office urged #China to respect #Taiwan’s democracy and cease its…

On the occasion of our 10-10 National Day, it was a delight to share a popular food truck dish 鴨隊堡 from Hualien 花蓮 with our visiting friends from St Lucia, Belize, and St Vincent & Grenadines. https://t.co/dTY4Z1ozw1

Glad to greet visitors Lesko (AZ) Biggs (AZ) Miller (WV) from US Congress.  We discussed the importance of two-way trade, investments, and the strong security partnership that ensures peace and prosperity in the IndoPacific. https://t.co/WkDdNFpPfx

Congratulations to @shigeruishiba in becoming the next Prime Minister of 🇯🇵Japan.  As neighbors, we have shared interests in peace and prosperity of the region, and I look forward to working to deepen friendly relations between our people.

My thoughts are with all those in southeastern USA affected by  #HurricaneHelene which has caused unprecedented damage in several areas.  Prayers for the resilience of communities struck, and hoping for quick recovery.  🙏
RT @ChingteLai: At the first Whole-of-Society Defense Resilience Committee meeting, we focused on uniting government & citizens to strength…

NGO’s such as Forward Alliance are contributing to Whole of Society Resilience efforts.  I attended an exercise where volunteers and NGO’s exercised & trained to help each other in crisis. https://t.co/KmtZQC6sVR
RT @ChingteLai: Congratulations to table tennis duo Tian Shiau-wen 田曉雯 & Lin Tzu-yu 林姿妤 on winning our first silver at the Paris #Paralympi…
RT @TaiwanPresSPOX: We greatly appreciate the visit by the 🇸🇪Swedish-Taiwanese Parliamentarian Association led by @fornarve. Our friends fr…

Delighted to welcome my old friend @NikkiHaley, and glad to hear that she plans to share the story of Taiwan’s resilience & the importance of the 🇹🇼🇺🇸partnership with the American people. https://t.co/FVocrV2d1b

I highly recommend this touching documentary about a unique friendship between indigenous Taiwanese CK Yang and African American Rafer Johnson, decathlon medalists in the 1960 Rome Olympics.     https://t.co/CVzpnnmAAE

So proud of Lin Yu Ting for bringing back Taiwan’s second Olympic gold medal this year.  The Champion  in women’s 57kg boxing, She has overcome hardship to arrive at this point, and her inspiring story is one of persistence, resilience, and strength.  🥇💪❤️

Taiwanese #women are tough and resilient.  Looking forward to boxer Lin Yu-ting win another medal tonight.  It will be the third women’s boxing medal for Taiwan in the #Paris2024Olympics.   You go, girl!  💪❤️
RT @willripleyCNN: Taiwan's golden moment at the Paris Olympics was cut short on Chinese TV. Much of the men's doubles badminton match was…
RT @ChingteLai: This weekend, #TeamTaiwan's Lin Yu-ting 林郁婷 is poised to make history in Olympic boxing for #Taiwan. Despite misleading cla…
Big congratulations to the Lee/Wang badminton team for winning their second Olympic gold!  So proud of #GOLD #TeamTaiwan
So proud of her! #TeamTaiwan
RT @MOFA_Taiwan: It's a shame that the #OlympicValues of respect & friendship at #Paris2024 were disregarded. Everyone should be free to ch…
RT @ChingteLai: As an avid sports fan, I have always admired the determination of our athletes—like our boxing contestant Lin Yu-ting 林郁婷,…

Good documentary ⬇️ As the Olympic Games begin, Taiwanese are uniquely enveloped in dilemmas and contradictions of geopolitics, realism, & injustices.  Yet we are a proud society and will be rooting for #TeamTaiwan.  https://t.co/pA0IOSfSxg

The wind and rain of the looming typhoon are not stopping our armed forces from their #HK40 live fire exercises.  I am grateful for their service and dedication to defending our land and our freedom.  

https://t.co/SEkkNn6AN0
RT @ChingteLai: Congratulations, @vonderleyen, on your reelection as @EU_Commission President. Greatly appreciate your steadfast support fo…

Shocked by the shooting.  Political violence is unacceptable.  I wish President Trump a speedy recovery from the injury as my thoughts also go out to the rally attendees affected.   I stand with those working to fortify democracies free of threats and violence.
